## What changed?

Describe the behavior and motivation.

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run test`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] Relevant UI or API flow tested

## Documentation

- [ ] README and relevant docs updated
- [ ] CHANGELOG updated when user-visible

## Data and privacy

- [ ] No real personal or family data is included
- [ ] No backups, SQLite files, PDFs, CSVs, screenshots with personal data, or secrets are included
- [ ] Logs do not expose notes, names, evidence references, credentials, or proxy identity headers

## Persistence and security

- [ ] Data-model impact described
- [ ] Migration added when required
- [ ] `docs/data-model.md` updated when required
- [ ] Security and deployment impact reviewed
